title: Intelligence Packet
description: FR-VID-12 §4 Stage 3 — Deterministic runtime bundle for one composition or review task. Assembled from intelligence/ assets in a fixed loading order and persisted for reuse across composition, regeneration, and review flows.

packet_id.description: Unique identifier for this intelligence packet instance.

project_id.description: Project this packet was built for.

command_target.description: The command or scene/beat target that triggered packet assembly.

loading_order.description: Deterministic sequence in which intelligence dependencies are loaded.

source_paths.description: Map of loading_order key to resolved filesystem path for each intelligence asset.

valid_for.description: Flow types this packet is valid for.

persisted_path.description: Filesystem path where this packet is persisted (e.g. .cmf/runtime/intelligence_packet_SC03.json).

assembled_at.description: Timestamp when this packet was assembled.
